command: echo '=== search simplicity-guard SKILL.md under project ==='; find /Users/Hugh/Hugh/Project -path '*/skills/simplicity-guard/SKILL.md' -type f 2>/dev/null; echo '=== git ls-files simplicity-guard ==='; cd /Users/Hugh/Hugh/Project/workflowhub && git ls-files | grep simplicity-guard || echo 'NOT_TRACKED'; echo '=== build-spec SKILL.md simplicity-guard in main worktree ==='; grep -n 'simplicity-guard' /Users/Hugh/Hugh/Project/workflowhub/workflows/build-spec/SKILL.md || echo 'NO_REFERENCE_MAIN'; echo '=== build-spec SKILL.md simplicity-guard in m13c worktree ==='; grep -n 'simplicity-guard' /Users/Hugh/Hugh/Project/workflowhub-m13c-build-code/workflows/build-spec/SKILL.md || echo 'NO_REFERENCE_M13C'
